/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -flto=auto -shared  -o /home/omar/luna/rtsp_trt/_rtsp_trt.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/_rtsp_trt.dir/src/python_ext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_rtsp_trt.dir/src/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_rtsp_trt.dir/src/stream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_rtsp_trt.dir/src/postprocess.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_rtsp_trt.dir/src/bytetrack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_rtsp_trt.dir/src/pipeline_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_rtsp_trt.dir/src/preprocess.cu.o CMakeFiles/_rtsp_trt.dir/src/postprocess_gpu.cu.o CMakeFiles/_rtsp_trt.dir/src/crop.cu.o   -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib /usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnvinfer.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnvinfer_plugin.so -lgstapp-1.0 -lgstvideo-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lyaml-cpp -lpthread -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
